title: Time-off approval chain (configurable validation steps)
reuse_advice: Approval steps are CONFIG via leave_validation_type (no_validation/hr/manager/both) per leave type — don't hardcode states. Extend action_approve/action_validate (call super()) only for side-effects.
when_not_enough: an approval chain with more levels than the standard validation types

title: Onboarding / multi-step activity plans (mail.activity.plan)
intents: danh sách việc cần làm cho nhân viên
reuse_advice: Use Activity Plans (mail.activity.plan, 17+) to launch a predefined set of activities (e.g. onboarding) at once. Don't build a custom checklist/task model.
when_not_enough: plans with conditional branching no static plan can express
